wordplay_note: Stuck in a manufactured reality — gummed up
card_description: Ragle Gumm (meaning "Gumm = sticky, adhering") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Time Out of Joint*. Contest winner in 1950s suburbia who discovers his life is a military simulation. Name note: Stuck in a manufactured reality — gummed up. The man whose comfortable reality is entirely fabricated — PKD's paranoid premise. First appears in *Time Out of Joint*.

reference.brief: Contest winner in 1950s suburbia who discovers his life is a military simulation
reference.significance: The man whose comfortable reality is entirely fabricated — PKD's paranoid premise
